overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a busy futuristic commercial sidewalk in a sunlit urban environment. The camera follows the character before stopping to observe NPCs sitting on a bench while traffic flows on the adjacent multi-lane road.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character along a sunlit futuristic commercial sidewalk. The camera moves past palm trees and street lights alongside a busy multi-lane road, approaching a concrete bench where two individuals are seated. The urban environment features towering glass skyscrapers in the background and a large digital billboard on the building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: building alcove with public seating and street observation point

agents.ego_description: stationary near a bench, observing two seated NPCs and watching pedestrians walk past on the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on the concrete bench, one appears to be reading or examining papers while the other sits beside them

entered.detail: plain concrete wall of the commercial building, replacing the decorated facade view

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary alongside a concrete building wall, focused on a bench where two NPCs are seated. Pedestrians occasionally walk past in the foreground while moderate traffic flows continuously on the multi-lane road to the left. The scene is partially shaded by the building overhang, creating a sheltered observation point with the distant overpass and city skyline still visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit futuristic sidewalk that transitions from a dynamic walk into a stationary observation of the urban bustle. It begins by trailing a character past palm trees and street lights, moving alongside a busy multi-lane road with towering glass skyscrapers and a large digital billboard looming in the background. As the camera approaches a concrete bench where two individuals are seated, the forward motion ceases, shifting the perspective to a fixed vantage point. The scene then settles against a concrete building wall, where the bright sunlight gives way to the shade of an overhang while pedestrians drift through the foreground. Finally, the view remains focused on the seated NPCs as traffic continues to flow toward a distant overpass and the sprawling city skyline.
